channel.title: The Engine Room on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in The Engine Room on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Terminal is Your Chalk Circle: Why I Code from the Observation Deck
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why leading in the era of Generative AI requires a shift from ‘getting your hands dirty’ in code to observing systems like a Toyota foreman in a chalk circle.

item.title: From CRM App to LLM Knowledge Base: A Markdown-Native CRM for the Agent Era
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Exploring the shift from traditional CRM software to LLM-maintained knowledge bases, where structured markdown files serve as the system of record for the agent era.

item.title: Context Hub vs. Context7: Revolutionizing AI Coding with Accurate Documentation
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A comparison of Context Hub and Context7, two emerging tools designed to provide AI coding agents with accurate, up-to-date documentation and reduce hallucinations.

item.title: Why the Yield Curve is the Pulse of Every Bank
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the ‘gravitational constant’ of finance: the yield curve. Former UBX CEO John Januszczak explains how interest rate spreads drive banking physics and why inversions stall the engine of innovation.

item.title: The Mechanics of Institutional-Grade Innovation: Structuring This Platform
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An operational breakdown of the CEO Playbook brand architecture and how its structure reflects the rigor of institutional-grade venture building.

item.title: Unlocking the Basel Framework: How Smart Compliance Drives Higher ROE
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A technical overview of the Basel Framework’s mechanics and how shifting from standardized to internal risk models can optimize capital efficiency and boost Return on Equity (ROE).

item.title: Category vs Tag
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An in-depth explanation of the differences and strategic uses of categories and tags, drawing parallels to taxonomies in content management systems.

item.title: The Evolution of Python Environment Management
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A practitioner’s walkthrough of why Python suffers from dependency hell, how tools like virtualenv, pyenv, Poetry, and UV emerged to solve it, and what this evolution tells us about modern software ecosystems.

item.title: The NPM Supply Chain Attack: A Wake-Up Call for Digital Infrastructure
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An analysis of the recent NPM supply chain attack, its implications for global digital infrastructure, and the urgent need for enhanced security in open-source ecosystems.

item.title: Creating R Packages: What You Need to Know
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Key lessons and impressions from authoring an R Package, with essential resources for starting your own.
